title: Flags view component with tab filtering and status counts
purpose: Displays a list of flags with tab navigation to filter by status, showing counts for each status category and handling loading and error states.
module_context: Exports a FlagsView component that uses a hook to fetch flags and manages tab state for filtering. Defines tab configurations and counts for each status type.

steps.content: Initialize the active tab state with the provided initial tab or default to 'all'.
Fetch all flags using the useFlags hook including resolve, dismiss, reopen, and refresh functions.
Filter the flags based on the currently active tab status.
Calculate the count of flags for each tab status.
Render a tab bar with navigation buttons for each status type and their respective counts.
Display loading state while flags are being fetched.
Display error state with retry option if flag loading fails.
Render the flags list component with filtered flags and action handlers.
IF the active tab is 'all', return all flags.
ELSE filter the flags to only include those matching the active tab status.
Initialize counts object with all status types set to zero.
Iterate through all flags and increment the count for each flag's status.
Navigate to the topic detail page using the window location.
